items.quote: Seal Prince and The Roof Rats are a young band I've been following for a couple of years. I love their social conscience and the focus on matters of climate and politics in their music. The most important element of this band, though, is the excellent musicianship and songwriting, and the beautiful and collaborative way they work together.
items.name: Sarah Carroll
items.role: Singer/Songwriter, Ukulele Queen of the Bellarine

items.quote: The Roof Rats… Smart, sassy, rock'n'roll with a message… AND a horn section! Simply irresistible.
items.name: Dave Steel

items.quote: A really wonderful experience. Seal Prince create an awesome community vibe at every gig they play. Great songs, great playing, really lovely people! Particularly enjoyed the fact they brought silverbeet along to give out to the crowd.
items.name: Nathan Power

items.quote: What a pleasure to listen to Seal Prince at the Geelong folk club. Fantastic harmonies with a beautiful folk vibe and a deep respect and understanding of musicality. Engaging, authentic and joyous. A wonderful set enjoyed by all present.
items.name: Bernadette O'Neill
